a:r.a:t: 1. GEM players are confronting an increasingly more challenging environment
Cost inflation, startup disruption, sustainability-based regulatory hurdles, and
are forcing GEM companies to manage compliance while pursuing growth
new possibilities for efficiency and growth
GEM customers and regulators demand transparency and sustainability in sourcing and production processes
mandating accelerated decarbonization efforts among GEM corporations
GEM organizations covet robust supply chains built to withstand the frequent geopolitical tensions and global disruptions that constantly impact the space
Shortage of skilled professionals and n
skill/capability requirements (e.g., GenAI usage, sustainability compliance) are forcing companies to be serious about
“Sales motions haven't changed, but there’s more pressure than ever to get 3 things right: upgrade your talent, ensure rigor in processes, and leverage tech”
A growing share of GEM players have significantly adopted GenAI
for a variety of uses (e.g., task automation), signaling a new wave of AI-driven competitive advantage
